plugins.name: Instagram Saver
plugins.description: Save Instagram posts and reels to your scratchpad for task extraction.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Twitter/X Bookmarks
plugins.description: Import bookmarked tweets and threads as scratchpad entries for processing.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Readwise Highlights
plugins.description: Sync Readwise highlights into your scratchpad. Extract tasks from your reading notes.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Voice Notes
plugins.description: Transcribe voice memos and extract tasks using your configured LLM provider.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Import GitHub issues and pull requests as tasks. Syncs labels to tags.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Notion Import
plugins.description: Import tasks and to-dos from Notion databases and pages into Kairos.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Linear Sync
plugins.description: Import Linear issues as tasks and keep their status in sync bidirectionally.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Email to Tasks
plugins.description: Forward emails to your scratchpad and extract actionable tasks automatically.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Slack Messages
plugins.description: Parse shared Slack messages and threads into actionable tasks with context.
plugins.author: Kairos Team

plugins.name: Todoist Import
plugins.description: Import tasks from Todoist with priorities, labels, and due dates preserved.
plugins.author: Kairos Team
